info.name: Disheat - Food Delivery API
info.description: Customer-facing API collection for Disheat food delivery platform.

request.description: Check if a user exists before login/registration. type: 'email' or 'mobile'
Step 1: send idToken only. If user exists → returns access_token. If new user → returns new_user:true with name+email. Step 2 (new user): resend with mobile + password + password_confirmation.
User must already be registered with a matching mobile number.
Replace 'system' with the setting slug: system | authentication | payment
Replace 'pizza-palace' with the actual store slug.
Check if a lat/lng falls inside a configured delivery zone.
Main product listing filtered by delivery zone from user coordinates.
Replace 'chicken-burger' with the actual product slug.
Replace 'top-picks' with the actual section slug.
Returns delivered order items the authenticated user can review.
address_type: home | work | other. Coordinates must fall inside a configured delivery zone or the request will fail.
Creates a new wishlist when wishlist_id is null, then adds the product. Pass an existing wishlist_id to add to it.

query.description: ID of saved address for delivery fee calculation

request.description: Returns full pricing: subtotal, delivery fee, rush delivery fee, promo discount, wallet deduction, grand total.
No product_variant_id — food delivery uses product_id + store_id + optional addons (e.g. extra cheese, large size).

body.raw:
{
  "payment_type": "cod",
  "address_id": 1,
  "rush_delivery": false,
  "use_wallet": false,
  "promo_code": null,
  "order_note": "Please ring the doorbell."
}

request.description: transaction_id is required for stripe. Get it from POST /stripe/create-order first.
Requires transaction_id + razorpay_order_id + razorpay_signature. Get them from POST /razorpay/create-order.
Replace 'order-slug-here' with the actual order slug from List Orders.
